name: writing
description: Open writing stage contract for evidence-traceable drafts, reports, presentations, and handoff deliverables.
intent: Write the requested scientific deliverable while tracing claims, citations, methods, data, and figures back to artifacts.
handoff_notes: Record which claims are supported, which are speculative, which computations are incomplete, and what remains to review.
risk_notes: Do not write unfinished computation, unsupported claims, or speculative explanations as established results.
